name: workflow state file is created at .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json on first transition
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/transition.sh" --to plan --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>err.txt && [ -f .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json ] && grep -q '"current_state":"plan"' .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && echo ok 1>&2
